The studio

Comprehensive,
unhurried dentistry.

At Dantia we pair calm, patient-first care with the latest digital dentistry — from preventive check-ups to guided implants and full-mouth rehabilitation. One unhurried studio in Alwarpet, where every smile is planned, not rushed.

No conveyor-belt appointments. Just clear explanations, gentle hands and results designed around your face.

What we do

Care for every smile,
under one roof.

From the first cleaning to the most complex implant case — delivered with the same calm, meticulous standard.

01

Dental Implants

Guided, single-visit implants that look, feel and bite like your own teeth.

02

Cosmetic & Veneers

Smile design, veneers and whitening tailored to your face — never one-size-fits-all.

03

Clear Aligners

Discreet, removable aligners that straighten on your schedule.

04

Kids Dentistry

Gentle, friendly visits that make children actually enjoy the dentist.

05

Painless Root Canal

Modern, near-painless endodontics — most cases finished in a single sitting.

06

Digital Dentistry

3D scanning and digital planning for precise, predictable results.

Advanced technology

Planned to the
micron.

Intraoral 3D scanning, guided surgery and same-day milling let us plan your treatment with precision — fewer appointments, less guesswork, better outcomes.

  • Intraoral 3D scanning — goodbye gooey impressions; a digital model in minutes.
  • Guided implant surgery — placement planned on CBCT for accuracy and comfort.
  • Same-day crowns — designed and milled in-house, so you leave whole.

Good to know

Frequently asked.

How much do dental implants cost?+
Implant pricing depends on the number of teeth and your bone condition. After a 3D scan we share a clear, itemised estimate — and 0% EMI is available on major treatments.
Can implants be done in a single visit?+
Many cases qualify for same-day / immediate implants. We confirm your suitability after a quick CBCT scan and examination.
Is treatment painful?+
We use modern anaesthesia and offer sedation options. Most patients describe their visit as surprisingly comfortable — including root canals.
What are your timings?+
We’re open Monday to Saturday, 9:30am–8:00pm, with Sunday appointments on request.
Do you help with insurance & EMI?+
Yes — we assist with insurance documentation and offer 0% EMI plans so you can spread the cost of larger treatments.
